title: Cloud Velore Snake Chain – 18K Gold Tone (Pack of 2)
short_description: A sleek herringbone snake chain in 18K gold tone with anti-tarnish coating — one pack, two chains, made for everyday shine.
body_html:
Meet the Cloud Velore Snake Chain — a flat herringbone weave that catches light like liquid gold. Plated in 18K gold tone over solid brass and sealed with an anti-tarnish coating, it stays bright through daily wear.

You get a pack of 2, so layer them, share one, or keep a spare. A secure lobster clasp keeps it locked in from desk to dinner.

  • 18K gold tone plating over brass
  • Herringbone snake-chain design — flat, flexible, fluid shine
  • Anti-tarnish coating for lasting colour
  • Lobster clasp for a secure fit
  • Pack of 2 — unisex, in 45cm and 55cm lengths

Wear it solo for a clean minimal look or stack it with pendants — the Velore goes with everything.
seo_title: Cloud Velore Snake Chain – 18K Gold Tone, Pack of 2
seo_description: Unisex herringbone snake chain in 18K gold tone plated brass with anti-tarnish coating. Pack of 2, lobster clasp. COD available, ships in 24 hrs.

metafields.highlights: 18K gold tone plating · Herringbone snake-chain design · Anti-tarnish coating · Lobster clasp · Pack of 2 · Unisex
metafields.material_or_ingredients: 18K gold tone plated brass with anti-tarnish coating
metafields.care_or_directions: Keep away from perfume, water and sweat. Wipe with a soft dry cloth after wear and store in a zip pouch to preserve the shine.
metafields.shipping: Ships in 24 hrs · COD available · Free shipping over ₹499

faqs.q: Will the gold colour fade or tarnish?
faqs.a: The chain has an anti-tarnish coating over 18K gold tone plating. With basic care — keeping it away from perfume, water and sweat — the shine lasts through regular wear.
Yes. The pack includes a 45cm length that sits neatly for women and a 55cm length suited to men, but either can be worn by anyone.

faqs.q: What is the chain made of?
faqs.a: It is crafted from brass, plated in 18K gold tone and finished with an anti-tarnish coating.

faqs.q: How many chains do I get?
faqs.a: Each order is a pack of 2 chains — layer them together, share one, or keep a spare.
Yes, COD is available across India, and orders ship within 24 hours.
